name: CYTOKINETICS INC
business: Cytokinetics sells MYQORZO (aficamten), an allosteric and reversible inhibitor of cardiac myosin motor activity approved for the treatment of adults with symptomatic obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy. The company also develops a pipeline of muscle-directed investigational medicines for cardiovascular and neuromuscular diseases, including omecamtiv mecarbil for heart failure and ulacamten for HFpEF.

exposures.sentence: Our first commercial product is MYQORZO (aficamten), 5 mg, 10 mg, 15 mg, and 20 mg tablets, which the FDA approved in December 2025.
Significant disruptions of information technology systems or breaches of data security could adversely affect our business.

catalysts.event: Report additional clinical data supporting label expansion for aficamten in nHCM
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report additional clinical data supporting a potential label expansion for aficamten in nHCM in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Complete enrollment in adolescent cohort of CEDAR-HCM
catalysts.sentence: We also expect to report complete enrollment in the adolescent cohort of CEDAR-HCM in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Potential approval of supplemental NDA for MYQORZO
catalysts.sentence: Assuming a standard review period, we expect a potential approval of the supplemental NDA by the FDA in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: First commercial revenues from MYQORZO reported
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report our first commercial revenues in May 2026 in our Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the fiscal quarter ending March 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Sanofi commences commercialization activities in China
catalysts.sentence: We expect Sanofi to commence commercializing activities in China in 2026.

catalysts.event: Complete enrollment in cohort 2 of AMBER-HFpEF
catalysts.sentence: AMBER-HFpEF is currently enrolling patients, and we expect to complete enrollment in cohort 2 of the study by the end of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Over 300,000 patients diagnosed with HCM in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: HCM is the most common monogenic inherited cardiovascular disorder, with well over 300,000 patients diagnosed in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: oHCM market potential exceeding $5 billion in U.S. and Europe combined by 2035
tamClaims.sentence: We believe the oHCM market has the potential to exceed $5 billion in the U.S. and Europe combined by 2035.
